title: NEA member Leon Smith named 2026 Teacher of the Year
summary_en: “On behalf of the National Education Association’s nearly three million members, we are proud to congratulate Leon – not only for this award and recognition, but for his dedication to all students and his commitment to his school and community,” said NEA President Becky Pringle.
title_cn: 美国全国教育协会会员利昂·史密斯获评2026年度教师
